---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**How to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- Install: [Docker Compose / manual]
- OTW version: [shown in the app]
- Module affected: [e.g. Trading Journal, Backtester]

**Logs / screenshots**
Paste relevant logs (`docker compose logs`) or screenshots if you can.
